archive_summary.title: Project Costs
archive_summary.description: Complete cost breakdown with budget, per-service, and per-task details.

included_content.item: budget summary and per-task cost breakdown

section.title: Project Costs (Full Detail)
section.content:
Total budget: $2000.00 Total spent: $290.08 Budget remaining: $1709.92 Spent: 14.5%
### Cost Breakdown by Category
* azure-ml-2xh100: $287.58 * claude-code-orchestration: $2.50
### Cost Breakdown by Service
* azure_ml: $287.58 * anthropic_api: $2.50
### Per-Task Costs
* t0002_baseline_evaluation: $2.50 * t0003_literature_review_entity_stt: $0.00 * t0004_vocabulary_biasing_experiment: $0.00 * t0005_stt_model_survey_brainpowa: $0.00 * t0008_moonshine_v2_benchmark: $0.00 * t0013_brainstorm_results_1: $0.00 * t0014_granite_short_clip_robustness: $0.00 * t0015_streaming_buffer_interval: $287.58
